allow: Bash(cd "c:/Users/bcozf/Downloads/nmt-pallet-system" && echo "=== .gitignore ===" && cat .gitignore && echo "=== .gitattributes ===" && cat .gitattributes && echo "=== vite.config.ts ===" && cat vite.config.ts && echo "=== tsconfig ===" && cat tsconfig.json && echo "=== .vscode/settings ===" && cat .vscode/settings.json && echo "=== public/ ===" && ls -la public/ && echo "=== env keys \(names only\) ===" && sed 's/=.*/=<redacted>/' .env.local)

PowerShell(Write-Output "--- ทดสอบ syntax ด้วย 4 bytes \(ไม่ใช่ secret จริง\) ---"; $b = New-Object byte[] 4; [System.Security.Cryptography.RandomNumberGenerator]::Create\(\).GetBytes\($b\); \($b | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('x2'\) }\) -join '')

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== โปรไฟล์เครือข่าย Wi-Fi \(ต้องเป็น Private\) ==="; Get-NetConnectionProfile | Select-Object Name, InterfaceAlias, NetworkCategory | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== firewall เปิดอยู่ไหม ==="; Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== มี rule อนุญาต node.exe หรือ port 3000 ไหม ==="; $r = Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Enabled True -Action Allow -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'node|vite|3000' }; if \($r\) { $r | Select-Object DisplayName, Profile | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output "ไม่พบ rule ที่ชื่อเกี่ยวกับ node/vite/3000" })
